programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

E14 - It's Time/Appreciation Day
programme.desc: Mordecai becomes extremely jealous when Rigby manages to get a date with Margaret. Mordecai tries to prevent Rigby from getting to his date on time by destroying all the clocks they have.

programme.title: E242 - Mud On The Run/The Sound And The Furry/Reststop Roustabout/That's The Stuff/Speed Of
programme.desc: Ben gets a tough lesson on knowing his limits when he competes in a grueling obstacle race-- made even worse by the Weatherheads!

programme.title: E14 - A. The Quest/The Spoon
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Anais rescue her doll from Tina Rex.

programme.title: E6 - Vote Gumball… And Bobert?/Vote Gumball… And Anyone?
programme.desc: Gumball is running for School President and is looking for a worthy running mate. He turns his attention to Bobert, the school's electronic wonderkid.

programme.title: E111 - The Vase/The Ollie/The Sorcerer/The Outside/The Copycats
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and 'accidentally' break her latest hideous vase. But when Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E16 - Mariana Trench: The Pacific Ocean
programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger.

programme.title: E9 - The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E2 - Chucklesome Trucks
programme.desc: When Rebecca works with the Troublesome Trucks, everyone expects the worst, but she defies everyone's expectations and has a very amusing day.

programme.title: E27 - Go Jet Academy: Compass Navigators
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E2 - Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E14 - Merry Sprouty Day Part 1
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E1 - The Making Music Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels find Duggee playing the saxophone, they want to have a go too. Several pots, balloons, tins, tubes and some water later and the Squirrels are making music. And boy, are they LOUD!

programme.title: E2 - The Whistling Badge
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: Decision To Leave
programme.desc: Kind and polite detective Haejun is entrusted with a case of unnatural death in the mountains. While investigating the case, he meets Seorae, the dead victim's wife, and can't help but both suspect and develop an interest in her.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Fiery First Experience of Voice Acting
programme.desc: New title of the Crayon Shinchan movie series, “Crayon Shinchan the Movie: Super-Hot! The Spicy Kasukabe Dancers”, has been released. For Hong Kong's Cantonese-dubbed version, singer Cloud Wan Ho Ying and new generation idol Phoebus Ng Kai Yeung have been invited to voice over two new characters. In this episode, Cloud and Phoebus will share the anecdotes from their dubbing experience; Phoebus will demonstrate some voice over techniques, and more behind-the-scene stories are to be told.

programme.title: Exclusive Premiere: Reborn
programme.desc: Ming & Cheng have a son named Won. One day, Won suddenly had a persistent high fever. As a result, Won died due to lack of rescue. She was very sad and thought that Won was still alive. Then, they meet a person name Xia, who could help people heal the pain of losing their loved ones, Xia gave Cheng a doll, which seemed to be just an ordinary doll, but when it reached her hands, the doll turned into Won. But in Ming eyes, he was just a doll. Xia reminds Ming that this doll must not be damaged. Since then, they have lived happily ever after. But Ming began to feel that Cheng was too obsessed with this illusion and felt that the doll was getting spooky and became an unknown object. He could not stand it and secretly destroyed the doll, but what he didn't expect that Cheng still regarded the broken doll as Won. She thought that he killed her son. Ming started arguing with her, hoping to wake her up, but accidentally injured Cheng, then unexpectedly something happened to Ming...

programme.title: Turning Point 2
programme.desc: To undertake the ending of TV drama “Lives of Omission”, Laughing is sentenced to life-imprisonment for killing Michael. In the prison, Laughing got to know Professor Fok, an introvert serving his sentence for drug-dealing. Professor Fok is a gifted psychologist who reads mind: discovering the deepest, darkest secrets of others, thus enabling him to manipulate and control others. Laughing learns more of psychology and he holds a strong admiration for Professor Fok. But in fact, Professor Fok has an ulterior motive. Laughing, confirming his imprisonment is all part of a new secret mission, the Security Bureau wants Laughing to infiltrate in prison to investigate further for the suspected corrupted cops...

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Fiery First Experience of Voice Acting
programme.desc: New title of the Crayon Shinchan movie series, “Crayon Shinchan the Movie: Super-Hot! The Spicy Kasukabe Dancers”, has been released. For Hong Kong's Cantonese-dubbed version, singer Cloud Wan Ho Ying and new generation idol Phoebus Ng Kai Yeung have been invited to voice over two new characters. In this episode, Cloud and Phoebus will share the anecdotes from their dubbing experience; Phoebus will demonstrate some voice over techniques, and more behind-the-scene stories are to be told.

programme.desc: Two drugs have been approved for their potential to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease - we look at how they work and report on new findings suggesting a food-derived component may also help.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E6 - Highlights 6
programme.desc: The final three contestants Kelly Holmes, Mike Tindall and Vogue Williams fight it out to be crowned Bear's Mission Survivor. The first task sees the group split for the first time, as the contenders abseil down a 300ft waterfall one by one. They then have to build a camp without their usual supplies, before tucking into the evening's dinner - rats, which must be gutted and cooked. The next morning, the team tackles a dense mangrove swamp, following the sound of a distress signal in an attempt to reach assistant Scott, and with the end in sight, Bear has one final challenge in store.

programme.title: E12 - Christmas in August
programme.desc: When a freak August snowstorm strands Claudia and Robin at Two Mile, Gary and Garon try to save the day by driving through the storm to bring them supplies but they wind up needing rescuing themselves.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Meherbaan
programme.desc: Meherbaan is the story of a family man, who has to decide between commitment, ethics and love between his 2 women.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Scooped!
programme.desc: When Addison and her classmates get a school assignment to write about local news – and the news is that laundry is going missing from balconies around Ayrton Park – Addison turns into investigative reporter to crack the case and get a scoop.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Hogie Goes to Hong Kong
programme.desc: The gang goes to celebrate the Chinese New Year in Hong Kong and meets Bo, who is incredibly worried that he has lost his good luck. They try all sorts of traditions and superstitions to help him find his luck, but Hogie has another idea that might help him out.

programme.title: Searching for White Eye
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers search for a legendary cheetah called White Eye in the Mountain Zebra National Park in South Africa. Along the way they spot zebras, buffalos, springboks and vervet monkeys.

programme.title: Finn Comes Aboard
programme.desc: Smiling Finn asks the Nektons for help to stop his father, Captain Hammerhead, from stealing a treasure that will destroy his family.

programme.title: Looking for Miniscule Microbes
programme.desc: How can microbes be of use at a birthday party? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of microorganisms. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with yeast, and get to know Satoshi Omura, a biochemist, who discovered medicine inside miniscule microbes.

programme.title: The Mysterious Multiplying Erics
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed that as you reduce the angle between two mirrors, you will see an ever-increasing number of objects? If the mirrors are parallel to each other, can we see infinity? Eric travels to another dimension to find out.

programme.title: Old Math is New Again
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to ancient Egypt to explore an age-old multiplication method. How is this ancient method of multiplication, using ‘times two', similar to that used by modern computers? Eric will find out by conducting a range of fun experiments.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Teeth
programme.desc: The doctors reveal what lurks inside the plaque bacteria on your teeth. Dr. Chris uses a remote-control car powered by his own urine, and Dr. Xand gets his verruca treated. In the emergency room, someone has a screw stuck up their nose.

programme.title: Everything We've Waited For
programme.desc: It's Amelie and Phoebe's turn to head to the Artistic British Championships, and for the first time, they will be competing as seniors. Phoebe is showing a new move on the uneven bars, and Amelie is performing her new floor routine.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.title: Horn of Africa
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers continue their journey through Mountain Zebra National Park in South Africa. Game rangers teach them about Black Rhinos and White Rhinos and the importance of protecting them.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Ice dancer Josh has a new partner, Lucy, but they have just weeks to pull off their first public performance. Ice hockey player Rais receives an offer he can't refuse, and figure skaters Josh and Kloe are preparing for a big international competition.

programme.title: An Impressive Comeback
programme.desc: Holly does some detective work to uncover the mysterious heritage of her foster dog. Karen welcomes a pair of posh kitties with a penchant for mischief. Scarlett, the Pomeranian, makes an impressive comeback. And Lola's eye gets specialist treatment.

programme.title: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets have to look after squealing piglets, get uncomfortably close to a giant horse that is having an internal examination, and do health checks on tiny homeless kittens.

programme.title: Heavy Surgery
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have got one day's experience under their belts. Today a wild boar needs the Junior Vets' help, a tiny dog goes in a massive scanner, and a snotty cow is having heavy surgery.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.title: E3 - Clown College
programme.desc: While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

programme.title: E4 - Chowder's Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Panini sets her love-struck eyes on Chowder, he tries every trick he can think of to convince her he's not her boyfriend.

programme.title: E3 - Clown College
programme.desc: While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

programme.title: E9 - The Clocktopus
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: E12 - Something I Ate
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max go on a tour of the impervious Fort Knox, but when Dr. Animo incites a hungry ani-mutate to attack the Fort, Ben must stop it before it gobbles up the nation's monetary standard!

programme.title: E16 - Riding The Storm Out
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen's camping trip is interrupted by the emotionless Weatherheads. But a malfunctioning Omnitrix, firing out a mishmash of aliens, may not be the forecast for success.

programme.title: E13 - Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year. Since it is the Year of the Pig, the dishes must feature pork products and be delicious enough to impress Hong Kong’s super chef Jowett Yu along with Tom, Padma and Graham.

programme.title: E14 - The Tao Of Macau
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season's last Quickfire? Then, the chefs get a tutorial in the traditional cuisine of Macau, a fusion of Chinese and Portuguese flavors, and are joined by their family members from back home. For the elimination challenge, the chefs are tasked with blending their own heritage with Chinese flavors in order to impress their love ones and the judges, in order to earn their spot in the finale.

programme.title: E13 - Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year. Since it is the Year of the Pig, the dishes must feature pork products and be delicious enough to impress Hong Kong’s super chef Jowett Yu along with Tom, Padma and Graham.

programme.title: E14 - The Tao Of Macau
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian. This infamous fruit is a delicacy in Macau, but will Padma and guest judge, James Beard Award winner Abe Conlon be able to stomach their creations for the season's last Quickfire? Then, the chefs get a tutorial in the traditional cuisine of Macau, a fusion of Chinese and Portuguese flavors, and are joined by their family members from back home. For the elimination challenge, the chefs are tasked with blending their own heritage with Chinese flavors in order to impress their love ones and the judges, in order to earn their spot in the finale.

programme.title: E4 - Chowder's Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Panini sets her love-struck eyes on Chowder, he tries every trick he can think of to convince her he's not her boyfriend.

programme.title: E14 - Shnitzel Makes A Deposit
programme.desc: Payday is always Shnitzel's favorite day. But it becomes the worst day of his life when he's forced to take Chowder along to the bank.

programme.title: E20 - Mung On The Rocks
programme.desc: Truffles gives Mung the cold shoulder after he forgets their 450th wedding anniversary. With Mung too sad to cook, Chowder must take action.

programme.title: E21 - The Heavy Sleeper
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: E10 - Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Go Outside & Play with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's go outside & play with JJ! First, JJ & his friends gather all the pillows they can find to build a giant, cozy fort in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as JJ's family rolls into a campsite for a big family vacation in their cool camper van! Then, join JJ & his grandparents for a fun-filled day at the train park. From taking care of Bingo to having a scavenger hunt at the beach with Cody, there are so many ways to play outside!

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E3 - What Will Cody Do Today?
programme.desc: What will Cody do today? Every day is a new adventure! He might move to a new house with his family & cat, Pickles. Or maybe he'll find a simple empty cardboard box & use his imagination to turn it into a turtle shell, a drum & a race car! He could go on a hike with JJ & race walnut sailboats, or stay home & sing the ABCs over a big pot of alphabet soup. With Cody, you never know what fun you'll have!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E16 - JJ's Fun Day of Sports & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun day of sports & play with JJ! He discovers the fun of putting on shoes & sliding at the playground. Then, sing 'Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes' while learning body parts! The active fun continues with a competitive soccer match against animal friends & a team sports day at the field. Plus, learn swimming skills on a hot day & go on an exciting ski trip with Ms. Appleberry & the class!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!

Delivered! - The Courier Driver Business
programme.desc: In many German cities, bicycle couriers deliver burgers, pizza, and other food to people's homes. Thousands of these riders come from India, lured by the promise of studying in Germany, and have incurred heavy debts.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander
programme.desc: The axolotl, a tailed amphibian, is a marvel of evolution. It can regenerate injured body parts and is exceptionally long-lived. However, the axolotl is only found in Mexico, and its habitat is disappearing.

programme.title: Of Caravan And The Dogs - Russia's Journalists And Their Fight For Press Fr
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Russian independent media and NGOs during the war in Ukraine. As the Putin government further escalates its suppression of free voices, newspaper Novaya Gazeta, radio station Echo of Moscow and Rain TV try to find ways to continue their work.

programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Russian independent media and NGOs during the war in Ukraine. As the Putin government further escalates its suppression of free voices, newspaper Novaya Gazeta, radio station Echo of Moscow and Rain TV try to find ways to continue their work.

programme.title: Delivered! - The Courier Driver Business
programme.desc: In many German cities, bicycle couriers deliver burgers, pizza, and other food to people's homes. Thousands of these riders come from India, lured by the promise of studying in Germany, and have incurred heavy debts.

programme.title: Of Caravan And The Dogs - Russia's Journalists And Their Fight For Press Fr
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Russian independent media and NGOs during the war in Ukraine. As the Putin government further escalates its suppression of free voices, newspaper Novaya Gazeta, radio station Echo of Moscow and Rain TV try to find ways to continue their work.

programme.title: Axolotl - The Magical Healing Powers Of A Salamander
programme.desc: The axolotl, a tailed amphibian, is a marvel of evolution. It can regenerate injured body parts and is exceptionally long-lived. However, the axolotl is only found in Mexico, and its habitat is disappearing.

programme.title: Delivered! - The Courier Driver Business
programme.desc: In many German cities, bicycle couriers deliver burgers, pizza, and other food to people's homes. Thousands of these riders come from India, lured by the promise of studying in Germany, and have incurred heavy debts.

programme.title: Delivered! - The Courier Driver Business
programme.desc: In many German cities, bicycle couriers deliver burgers, pizza, and other food to people's homes. Thousands of these riders come from India, lured by the promise of studying in Germany, and have incurred heavy debts.

programme.title: E4 - Blending The Old With The New
programme.desc: The Monastery of the Augustinian Sisters has been redesigned as a hotel complex focusing on harmony between the old and the new. At the Verdun Auditorium, the new arena perfectly sits side by side with the 1938 Art Deco wing and the beautiful EcoRad radiators.

programme.title: E16 - Lucille Boitelle/Gabriela Hearst/Mathieu Casseau
programme.desc: In the heart of Lyon, the Musee des Beaux-Arts houses 90,000 works of art. Lucille Boitelle is an ornamental painter who creates worlds that embellish any surface. Sensual and ethereal: the show by Uruguayan designer Gabriela Hearst. In Douarnenez, ceramist Mathieu Casseau handles clay with vigour and gentleness.

programme.title: E4 - All The Flavour Of Quebec
programme.desc: Exploring the city of Quebec, all the way to the Saguenay Fjords National Park, in deep mid-winter then in autumn as the forest dons its most vibrant colours. With historian and photographer Pierre Lahoud, we fly over the icebound Saint Lawrence, one of the world's most dangerous navigable waterways.

programme.title: E6 - Natural Beekeeping
programme.desc: Honey, royal jelly, pollen, wax: since ancient times, bees have collected and transformed these products full of virtues. They are found in daily life, in dietary supplements, and in cosmetic formulations. A journey to discover this sector, from the Marquesas Islands to Tahiti.

programme.title: E4 - All The Flavour Of Quebec

programme.title: E11 - Gers, From Village To Village
programme.desc: A picture postcard of the Gascony countryside, the Gers, with its vineyards and verdant landscapes, is a ''big garden'', rich in agriculture and livestock. The birthplace of d'Artagnan and Armagnac, Gascon traditions and cuisine live on in this land of history and culture.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: The Spirit Of Yachting
programme.desc: The Spirit of Yachting series showcases the foremost yachting events worldwide, from offshore classics such as the Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race and the Rolex Fastnet Race, to jewels of the Mediterranean season, the Maxi Yacht Rolex Cup and Rolex Middle Sea Race as well as offering insightful documentary content on the exhilarating Rolex SailGP Championship.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E424
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E471
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.
PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular
programme.desc: Premium Spectacular offers Phoenix's finest documentaries in our weekend prime time slot. Each episode comes relevant to the latest news that hits the headlines. Themes range from hot current affair issues at home and abroad, to diverse topics of social, historical and cultural interests.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E3 - In the Extreme
programme.desc: Follow a host of sharks with extraordinary abilities that allow them to thrive in the most adverse conditions around the globe. Observe nearly blind Greenland sharks made for life in freezing Arctic waters, and another species that can walk on land.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn
programme.desc: Adapt or perish in the coral streets as higher-than-normal temperatures make autumn cooling (and survival) more difficult. Shack up with a clownfish family and their sea anemone landlord, then see cleaner fish give manta rays a day at the spa.

programme.title: E3 - In the Extreme
programme.desc: Follow a host of sharks with extraordinary abilities that allow them to thrive in the most adverse conditions around the globe. Observe nearly blind Greenland sharks made for life in freezing Arctic waters, and another species that can walk on land.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn
programme.desc: Adapt or perish in the coral streets as higher-than-normal temperatures make autumn cooling (and survival) more difficult. Shack up with a clownfish family and their sea anemone landlord, then see cleaner fish give manta rays a day at the spa.

programme.title: E1 - Sea of Cortez
programme.desc: Cabo Pulmo, a tiny ocean community on the shores of Mexico’s Sea of Cortez, is home to an extraordinary story of marine recovery. By the mid-1980s, this near-pristine coral reef was all but wiped out – decimated by reckless overfishing. That is, until those same fishermen abandoned their way of life and fought to save what Jacques Cousteau once called ‘the aquarium of the world'.

programme.title: E6 - Leopard
programme.desc: Prowl the Sri Lankan jungle with the leopard, who is a master of camouflage. See how this formidable feline hunter has adapted perfectly to the hot, dry climate on the island, then discover its best tricks for stalking and catching deer.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

E5
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E300 - PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E311 - Wiener Takes All
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's.

programme.title: E513 - Hurl, Interrupted / Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret. // After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: E515 - Director's Rut / Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: E222 - Krabby Patty Creature Feature / Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes. Thankfully, SpongeBob's there to show them the ropes!

programme.title: E503 - The Boss Maybe / Family Bonding
programme.desc: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter. // Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: E119 - Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E207 - Mimic Madness
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that 'imitation is the sincerest form of flattery' - too bad no one told him how to stop!

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E518 - Camped!
programme.desc: When Dad discovers that his childhood camp is closing, he decides to take the family for one final visit. // They soon uncover a map that could lead to a treasure big enough to save it and prove the existence of an old camp legend.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E105 - Save the Date

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: A collection of outrageous problems that you have never heard of! A great 'knowledge talk show' where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E8 - Hindsight
programme.desc: A case comes to haunt Tess when a righteous lawyer challenges her testimony about a home invasion gone wrong, threatening to overturn the conviction and Tess's future with the force – all on the basis of her vision loss. When Bennett takes Tess off the case to contain a potential scandal, Tess finds an unexpected ally in Owen, but she and Sunny are left wondering about their future, and worse: did Tess put an innocent man in jail? Tess leans on Matt and Mia, while Sunny grows hilariously defensive with her new therapist.

programme.desc: A case comes to haunt Tess when a righteous lawyer challenges her testimony about a home invasion gone wrong, threatening to overturn the conviction and Tess's future with the force – all on the basis of her vision loss. When Bennett takes Tess off the case to contain a potential scandal, Tess finds an unexpected ally in Owen, but she and Sunny are left wondering about their future, and worse: did Tess put an innocent man in jail? Tess leans on Matt and Mia, while Sunny grows hilariously defensive with her new therapist.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Nagahama Mitsuri: The Ultimate Extreme Climax
Kojima Minami: An Affair Beyond Marriage
Isumi Momoka: Silky Skinned Classical Beauty
Kojima Minami: An Affair Beyond Marriage
Isumi Momoka: Silky Skinned Classical Beauty
Kojima Minami: An Affair Beyond Marriage
Isumi Momoka: Silky Skinned Classical Beauty
Thou Shall Not Commit
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Feng was an orphan. When he went on a date with a writer Zhi, Zhi died unexpectedly. After Feng was out of prison, his father's old friend Wei took him home to stay temporarily. One day, Feng received mysterious phone message from a woman Qi, and then he began to be deeply in love with her. Under the guidance of Wei, a love expert, Feng finally won Qi's heart. Wei suddenly arrived while Feng and Qi were having their breakfast in bed...

programme.title: A Man Called Hero
programme.desc: Hero goes home with excited but he finds his parent was killed. Gian took a group of foreigners to Hero's parents and forced them to hand over the Red Sword, their family treasure...

programme.title: The Dragon Chronicles The Maidens of Heavenly Mountains
programme.desc: The one who solves hermit Ding's chess game will become the grand master of martial arts. A shaolin young monk must solve the complex game to forestall great calamity...

programme.title: Lady Reporter
programme.desc: FBI Cindy is ordered to Hong Kong to get the leader of counterfeit banknote manufacturing syndicate, Huang Te. In Hong Kong, Huang goes into the printing business. Ostensibly, he publishes a newspaper. But his real business is still the forgoing of banknotes. Cindy gets a job as the paper's reporter but alert Hong Kong police tell her to keep off. It is their job to get Huang. Cindy happens to know her friend's father is the prosecutor in Huang's trial. She tries to help but Huang gets off by poisoning the prosecutor. Now Cindy is desperate. The police want to see her back in America. She wants to get Huang herself...

programme.title: E11 - 英倫男被三女圍攻？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E16 - Book Exchange
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... programme.title: E85 - Christine Arron
programme.desc: She's a major figure in French athletics: world champion, European champion, Olympic medallist, and holder of the European 100m record, sprinter Christine Arron joins Pierre Classen.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.
